programs.title: New York Homicide
programs.sub_title: Murder on the Upper East Side
programs.desc: In the most expensive zip code in Manhattan, an aging, eccentric art collector is found strangled in his apartment.

programs.title: New York Homicide
programs.desc: When the owner of a Brooklyn pizzeria is gunned down in broad daylight in his backyard, the news publishes mafia theories, and the FBI joins the NYPD to investigate.

programs.title: Philly Homicide
programs.desc: A veteran police officer gets attacked in the line of duty; detectives make it their mission to bring his killer to justice; as they investigate a troubled Philadelphia suburb, they soon uncover a crime of the ultimate betrayal.

programs.title: Philly Homicide
programs.desc: When a hospital employee dies mysteriously on a Center City sidewalk, detectives uncover surveillance footage of the murder that leads straight to the doorstep of a suspected serial killer who may be tied to a string of unsolved crimes.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: Detectives in Washington, D.C., discover a puzzling connection between two women who disappeared two decades apart; an investigation reveals a sinister secret hidden along one of the busiest stretches of interstate in the country.

programs.title: Forensic Files
programs.desc: A woman is found dead, police use blood evidence and computer forensics to convince a jury that the murderer is guilty.
